title: Elevate UI Readability: Master CSS 'hyphens' for Optimal Text Flow
tweet: Boost your UI's readability and text flow! Learn how CSS 'hyphens' prevents awkward gaps in justified text, creating a smoother reading experience with web fonts. #CSSTypography #UIDesign #WebFonts #UX
tip: Tame unruly text blocks and elevate user experience with the CSS 'hyphens' property. Especially in justified layouts or narrow columns, automatic hyphenation can significantly improve readability by preventing large word spacing and unsightly 'rivers' of white space. This leads to a more professional and visually appealing text flow, crucial for a seamless UI.
css_snippet: p { -webkit-hyphens: auto; /* For Safari */ -ms-hyphens: auto; /* For Edge/IE */ hyphens: auto; text-align: justify; /* Use with caution for justified text; ensure the document's lang attribute is set for proper language-specific hyphenation. */ }
